title: Salvaged Items
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SearchAndRescue WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, CAST(SUM(Count) AS INTEGER) AS value FROM SearchAndRescue WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
